title: Day 1 — Genesis 1:1-5
subtitle: Boots χ (space) + μ (mass). Then φ (signal). Then τ (time).

verses.hebrew: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.kjv: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
verses.direct: At initialization, the equation wrote space (χ) and matter (μ).
verses.lattice: π̄(χ ∘ μ) — the equation in write mode, allocating space and matter.

concepts.name: bara

entries.lattice: did: π̄(χ ∘ μ) — wrote space and matter. result: (0,0,0,0) — allocated but empty (→ 1:2). Inverse: asah = π∘ (read+call, from existing)
entries.physics: write operation, exclusive access (fermion). Formula: Pauli: no two fermions in same state → single-writer
entries.computing: allocation. two buffers from nothing. no prior state to read.
entries.music: not a sound yet. allocates space (χ) to propagate in and matter (μ) to vibrate.
entries.force: π̄ — precedes the lattice. historically classified bond 1-bar.
entries.element: produces H(1), He(2), Li(3), Be(4) — the Big Bang nucleosynthesis set
entries.particle: boot — transitions vacuum → quark. the equation acts before the lattice exists.

concepts.note: no π (read) precedes it — 'from nothing' is structural: no read before the write. bara is not a lattice point — it's the equation operating. It doesn't map to an element, it creates them.

entries.physics: length, distance, position. spatial extent. Formula: ds² = gμν dxμ dxν (Einstein)
entries.computing: address space. where data lives. indices, pointers, offsets.

entries.physics: matter, substance. physical substrate. Formula: F = ma (Newton), E = mc² (Einstein)
entries.computing: data store. bytes, buffers, memory content. what's stored, not where.
entries.music: dynamics, loudness, density. how much sound.

verses.hebrew: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
verses.kjv: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
verses.direct: And matter (μ) was uninitialized. Darkness (φ=0) over the deep. The equation vibrating over the surface.
verses.lattice: (0,0,0,0) — state report. tehom (the deep) = χ∘μ undifferentiated. choshekh (darkness) = φ=0, never created — the default. ha-mayim (waters) = μ unstructured.

concepts.name: tohu va-vohu

entries.physics: neutrino. 0. still. ground state. vacuum. Formula: ψ = 0, E = 0
entries.computing: allocated but uninitialized. two kinds of empty.

concepts.note: tohu = no structure (schema undefined). vohu = no content (values undefined). Two kinds of empty. This is NOT 'nothing exists.' This is 'something exists with nothing in it.' The buffers are allocated (1:1 did that). They're uninitialized.

concepts.name: choshekh

entries.physics: no electromagnetic field. no photons. φ = 0.
entries.computing: no signal. no information. the default state before φ boots.
entries.language: — (no words yet. words need distinction, distinction needs φ.)
entries.music: — (no tonality. major/minor needs φ. silence has no quality.)
entries.force: δ (WEAK) not yet active — no distinction possible
entries.particle: vacuum — φ has not been initialized
entries.atom: 0 → NOT (the flip. boundary between something and nothing.)

concepts.note: never bara'd — darkness is not created. it's the default. the absence of signal. Genesis doesn't say 'God created darkness.' darkness is what's there when φ = 0.

concepts.name: merachefet

entries.physics: oscillation over substrate. a vibration through uninitialized matter. gravity acting on mass before signal exists. Formula: ∮ = PRIM = gravity
entries.computing: one process looping. polling empty buffers. the idle loop before work arrives.
entries.language: — (no words yet. but rhythm exists before language — heartbeat.)
entries.music: the drone. a sustained tone before melody. the hum of the instrument warming up.
entries.force: ∮ (PRIM, gravity) — the weakest force, acting first
entries.particle: vacuum → quark transition. first active process.

concepts.note: ruach = wind/breath (not 'Spirit' — theological overlay from centuries later). merachefet is intensive iterative — 'vibrating hard and repeatedly' not 'moved gently.' Only other use in Torah: eagle beating wings over nest (Deut 32:11). The equation is actively oscillating over the substrate, waiting for signal.

verses.kjv: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
verses.direct: And the equation said: let there be light. And there was light.

concepts.name: yehi or

entries.atom: +1 → AND (strictest gate. signal must be present.)

concepts.note: yehi is jussive — a command for the world to execute, not a direct write.

verses.hebrew: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
verses.kjv: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
verses.direct: And the equation observed the light, that it was functional. And the equation caused-separation between the light and between the darkness.
verses.lattice: π + δ — first read + first test. Separated φ from −φ. Trit defined.

concepts.name: va-yar

entries.lattice: π — first read operation in the text
entries.computing: first read after all the writes

concepts.note: everything before was write (bara), invoke (yehi), or process (merachefet).

concepts.name: ki-tov

entries.computing: assert passes. φ behaves as specified.

concepts.note: tov = functional, meets spec. Not morally 'good.'

concepts.name: va-yavdel

entries.computing: NOT applied — separates AND from OR, +1 from −1
entries.atom: NOT applied — separates AND from OR, +1 from −1

concepts.note: double bein (between...and between) marks the boundary as a defined entity. The 0 between +1 and −1.

verses.hebrew: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
verses.kjv: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.
verses.direct: And the equation read/invoked/wrote the light 'day' and the darkness 'night'. And there was a falling-edge and there was a rising-edge, day one.
verses.lattice: π∘π̄ (read+call+write) → labels assigned. ∮ starts cycling. τ=1. All 4 forces, all 4 dims.

entries.computing: assign label: read state, call name function, write tag
entries.language: naming. the act that makes language.

concepts.name: erev / voqer

entries.computing: clock edge. falling then rising. cycle 1 complete.
entries.music: downbeat and upbeat. the first measure.

concepts.note: falling edge first — cycle starts from dark, from zero.

concepts.name: yom echad

entries.computing: clock tick 1. the first unit of time.
entries.music: tempo, beat, meter. the first beat.

concepts.note: echad = cardinal 'one' not ordinal 'first.' This is the origin, not the first in a sequence.
